title: The Event Horizon Choir
emotional_profile: dark-sci-fi: cosmic loneliness, quantum dread, elegiac wonder, vast emptiness, strange beauty at the end of things
cinematic_description: A quantum research ring station orbiting a dying star. The Choir is the sound of spacetime itself as the star collapses. Dr. Liora Kane's world is one of scale, finality, and the terrible beauty of the end.
quality_notes: Both assets passed strict QA. Different in tone and composition from previous sci-fi assets. Strong emotional match for cosmic loneliness + elegiac wonder.
